Cones · All Day
Ice Cream Cone — 2 Scoops
Double scoop of house-made ice cream in a waffle cone
FJD$10
Price
1×
Portions
1 min
Prep
0 min
Cook
All Day
Service
Ingredients
IngredientUnitQty
Ice Cream
Ice cream, 2 scoops (same or different flavours)scoop2
Cone
Waffle coneeach1
Method
1
Select waffle cone. Check for cracks.
2
Scoop first scoop into cone, press firmly.
3
Add second scoop on top, angled slightly for stability.
4
Serve immediately.
Plating Notes
Two scoops stacked. Serve immediately to prevent dripping.
Equipment
Ice cream scoop · Cone holder
